news.t: Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits
Schwab Asset Management Announces Index and Fund Name Changes to Its Fundamental Index ETF and Mutual Fund Family

holdings.infoBox: FNDB is an equity ETF with a total of 1641 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 4.06%, Intel at 2.42%, Exxon Mobil at 2.13%, Alphabet at 2.07%, and Microsoft at 1.87%.

overview.description: The Schwab Fundamental U.S. Broad Market ETF (FNDB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a US equity index, selected and weighted based on three fundamental factors (sales, cash flow, and dividends/buybacks). FNDB was launched on Aug 8, 2013 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: RAFI Fundamental High Liquidity US All Index

data.title: Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits
data.text: WESTLAKE, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Schwab Asset Management®, the asset management arm of The Charles Schwab Corporation, today announced forward share splits on 20 Schwab ETFs. Forward ETF share splits...
